name: Shogun of Rei
description:
You are in the chamber of the Shogun of Rei.  The Shogun here knows well of
the value of other people.  In fact, he even respects your insignificant
carcass.  Hmm . . . how odd, no one else does.

exits.description: The antechamber is north of you.
A stairway leads up from here.
